acorn.title: Parsing Code
acorn.content:
Some notes I took while working with Acorn code parser.
acorn
npm i acorn
Supporting TypeScript
If you want to support TypeScript, make sure to use the npm package @sveltejs/acorn-typescript instead of acorn-typescript.
The latter is no longer being maintained.
npm i @sveltejs/acorn-typescript

index.title: Welcome to the Imladris Archives
index.content:
May it be a light to you in dark places, when all other lights go out.

Welcome to my digital garden!
This place is a collection of random thoughts,
cool ideas, things I’ve learned and maybe even more.
